title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入埃斯瓦蒂尼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入埃斯瓦蒂尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Eswatini SWASA conformity requirements, ESERA energy regulatory licensing expectations, EEC grid-connection practice, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, NFPA 855 fire-safety direction, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Note: Eswatini's BESS-specific regulatory framework is nascent; several bodies and requirements listed here have not been independently confirmed as of the dataset date.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与埃斯瓦蒂尼SWASA合格评定要求、ESERA能源监管许可预期、EEC并网实践、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安全指引、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。注：埃斯瓦蒂尼的BESS专项监管框架尚处于起步阶段，本数据集列出的部分机构和要求截至数据集日期尚未获得独立确认。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與埃斯瓦蒂尼SWASA合格評定要求、ESERA能源監管許可預期、EEC併網實踐、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安全指引、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。注：埃斯瓦蒂尼的BESS專項監管框架尚處於起步階段，本資料集列出的部分機構和要求截至資料集日期尚未獲得獨立確認。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SWASA conformity scope determination, ESERA licensing approval, EEC grid-connection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Eswatini's BESS-specific regulatory framework is at an early stage and key requirements may not yet be publicly documented. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current SWASA technical standards, ESERA licensing requirements, EEC grid-connection technical specifications, NFPA fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SWASA合格评定范围裁定、ESERA许可批准、EEC并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。埃斯瓦蒂尼的BESS专项监管框架尚处于起步阶段，主要要求可能尚未公开记录。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行SWASA技术标准、ESERA许可要求、EEC并网技术规格、NFPA消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SWASA合格評定範圍裁定、ESERA許可批准、EEC併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。埃斯瓦蒂尼的BESS專項監管框架尚處於起步階段，主要要求可能尚未公開記錄。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行SWASA技術標準、ESERA許可要求、EEC併網技術規格、NFPA消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Eswatini does not yet have a confirmed, publicly documented mandatory BESS product safety or grid-connection regulation specific to battery energy storage systems. The country is a landlocked SADC/SACU member that imports the majority of its electricity from South Africa (Eskom) and whose grid interconnection practice is understood to align with South African NRS standards — though this has not been independently confirmed for BESS-specific requirements. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Eswatini are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline — Chinese GB/T 36276 and GB 38031 are not accepted substitutes; (2) ESERA licensing and EEC grid-connection approval, likely referencing IEC 62933 and NRS-family standards, though no confirmed public specification exists; (3) SWASA conformity marking, whose scope for BESS products has not been confirmed; (4) NFPA 855-aligned fire-safety installation documentation where referenced by the project authority; and (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport documentation mandatory under international transport conventions. The 230/400 V 50 Hz grid nominally matches Chinese grid voltage, reducing PCS reconfiguration risk, but ESERA and EEC requirements must be verified directly with those authorities.
answer_first.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼尚无针对储能电池系统的经确认、公开记录的强制性BESS产品安全或并网法规。该国为内陆SADC/SACU成员国，大部分电力从南非（Eskom）进口，其并网实践据悉与南非NRS标准相符——但这一点在BESS专项要求方面尚未获得独立确认。中国BESS出口埃斯瓦蒂尼的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为国际预期基准——中国GB/T 36276和GB 38031不被接受为替代依据；（2）ESERA许可和EEC并网批准，可能参照IEC 62933和NRS系列标准，但目前没有经确认的公开规格；（3）SWASA合格评定标志，其对BESS产品的适用范围尚未确认；（4）项目主管机关要求时，需提供符合NFPA 855的消防安全安装文件；（5）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输文件。230/400 V 50 Hz电网名义上与中国电网电压一致，降低了PCS重新配置的风险，但ESERA和EEC的具体要求仍须直接向相关机构核实。
answer_first.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼尚無針對儲能電池系統的經確認、公開記錄的強制性BESS產品安全或併網法規。該國為內陸SADC/SACU成員國，大部分電力從南非（Eskom）進口，其併網實踐據悉與南非NRS標準相符——但此點在BESS專項要求方面尚未獲得獨立確認。中國BESS出口埃斯瓦蒂尼的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為國際預期基準——中國GB/T 36276和GB 38031不被接受為替代依據；（2）ESERA許可和EEC併網批准，可能參照IEC 62933和NRS系列標準，但目前沒有經確認的公開規格；（3）SWASA合格評定標誌，其對BESS產品的適用範圍尚未確認；（4）項目主管機關要求時，需提供符合NFPA 855的消防安全安裝文件；（5）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸文件。230/400 V 50 Hz電網名義上與中國電網電壓一致，降低了PCS重新配置的風險，但ESERA和EEC的具體要求仍須直接向相關機構核實。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
